div.h3: Relocation Site Mapping Algorithm — TDD Spec 033
div.p: Revision: 1.0.4 | Target: x86_64 ELF Static Linker

ol.li: Alignment: Patch target must be 4-byte aligned for performance.
Overflow: Rel32 calculation must fit in signed int32.
Page Boundary: If relocation crosses page, linker must handle mprotect.
Byte Order: Little-Endian (LSB at lowest address).
